mystery.tip: The 'y' in the middle makes a short /i/ sound!

treasure.tip: 'sure' here makes a soft /zh/ sound, like in measure.

sneaky.tip: 'ea' makes the long /ee/ sound. 'y' makes another /ee/ sound.

catastrophe.tip: A long word! 'phe' makes the /fee/ sound like an 'f'.

someone.tip: A compound word. 'some' and 'one' are both tricky sight words!

outside.tip: A compound word. 'out' and 'side'. The magic 'e' makes 'i' say its name.

marshmallows.tip: Three parts! 'lows' makes the long /o/ sound.

sneezes.tip: 'sn' makes the /sn/ blend. 'ee' makes the long /ee/ sound.

achoo.tip: 'ch' makes the /ch/ sound. 'oo' makes the long /oo/ sound.

snotty.tip: 'sn' makes the /sn/ blend. 'y' makes the long /ee/ sound.

yucky.tip: Two parts: 'yuck' and 'y'. The 'ck' digraph makes the /k/ sound, and 'y' sounds like /ee/.

slippery.tip: Three parts. The 'y' makes the long /ee/ sound.

poo.tip: 'p' makes the popping /p/ sound. 'oo' makes the long /oo/ sound.

smelly.tip: 'y' at the end makes the long /ee/ sound.

pig.tip: 'p' makes the /p/ sound. 'ig' makes the /ig/ sound.

big.tip: 'b' makes the /b/ sound. 'ig' makes the /ig/ sound.

wig.tip: 'w' makes the /w/ sound. 'ig' makes the /ig/ sound.

fat.tip: 'f' makes the /f/ sound. 'at' makes the /at/ sound.

rat.tip: 'r' makes the /r/ sound. 'at' makes the /at/ sound.

hat.tip: 'h' makes the /h/ sound. 'at' makes the /at/ sound.

mat.tip: 'm' makes the humming /m/ sound. 'at' makes the short /at/ sound.

bunny.tip: Two parts: 'bun' and 'ny'. The 'y' makes the long /ee/ sound.

hops.tip: 'h' makes the /h/ sound. 'ops' makes the /ops/ sound.

funny.tip: Two parts: 'fun' and 'ny'. The 'y' makes the long /ee/ sound.

carrot.tip: Two parts: 'car' and 'rot'. 'c' makes the hard /k/ sound.

full.tip: 'f' makes the /f/ sound. 'ull' makes the /ool/ sound.

very.tip: 'v' makes the /v/ sound. 'y' makes the long /ee/ sound.

white.tip: 'wh' makes the /w/ sound. 'ite' has a magic 'e' that makes 'i' say its name.

grass.tip: 'gr' is a blend. 'ass' makes the /as/ sound.

farted.tip: 'fart' has a bossy 'r' sound. 'ed' makes the /id/ sound.

see.tip: 's' makes the /s/ sound. 'ee' makes the long /ee/ sound like in tree.

the.tip: 'the' is a sight word. 'th' makes the buzzy /th/ sound.

cat.tip: 'c' makes the hard /k/ sound. 'at' makes the short /at/ sound.

has.tip: 'h' makes a breathing /h/ sound. 'as' sounds like /az/ here.

a.tip: 'a' is spoken as a soft 'uh' /ə/ sound here.

sits.tip: 's' makes the /s/ sound. 'its' makes the /its/ sound.

on.tip: 'o' makes the short /o/ sound. 'n' makes the nasal /n/ sound.

is.tip: 'is' is a sight word. It sounds like /iz/.

happy.tip: Two parts: 'hap' and 'py'. The 'y' at the end makes a long /ee/ sound.

this.tip: 'th' makes the buzzy /th/ sound. 'is' makes the /iz/ sound.

sam.tip: 's' makes the /s/ sound. 'am' makes the /am/ sound.

dog.tip: 'd' makes the popping /d/ sound. 'og' makes the /og/ sound.

likes.tip: 'l' makes the /l/ sound. The silent 'e' makes the 'i' say its name /ai/.

to.tip: 'to' is a sight word. It sounds like 'too' /tu:/.

run.tip: 'r' makes the growly /r/ sound. 'un' makes the short /un/ sound.

red.tip: 'r' makes the growly /r/ sound. 'ed' makes the /ed/ sound.

ball.tip: 'b' makes the /b/ sound. 'all' makes the /awl/ sound.

plays.tip: 'pl' is a blend. 'ays' makes the long /ay/ sound like in day.

in.tip: 'i' makes the short /i/ sound. 'n' makes the /n/ sound.

mud.tip: 'm' makes the humming /m/ sound. 'ud' makes the short /ud/ sound.

bird.tip: 'b' makes the /b/ sound. 'ird' has a bossy 'r' that makes the /erd/ sound.

tree.tip: 'tr' is a blend. 'ee' makes the long /ee/ sound.

she.tip: 'sh' is a quiet digraph that says /sh/. 'e' says its name /ee/.

wants.tip: 'w' makes the /w/ sound. 'ants' sounds like /onts/ here.

build.tip: 'build' is a sight word. The 'ui' sounds like a short /i/.

nest.tip: 'n' makes the /n/ sound. 'est' makes the /est/ sound.

finds.tip: 'f' makes the breathing /f/ sound. 'inds' makes the /aindz/ sound.

green.tip: 'gr' is a blend. 'ee' makes the long /ee/ sound.

moss.tip: 'm' makes the humming /m/ sound. 'oss' makes the /oss/ sound.

and.tip: 'a' makes the short /a/ sound. 'nd' is a final blend.

straw.tip: 'str' is a three-letter blend. 'aw' makes the yawning /aw/ sound.

three.tip: 'thr' is a blend. 'ee' makes the long /ee/ sound.

blue.tip: 'bl' is a blend. 'ue' makes the /oo/ sound.

eggs.tip: 'egg' makes the /eg/ sound. The 's' makes the /z/ sound at the end.

are.tip: 'are' is a sight word. It sounds like the letter 'R'.

leo.tip: Two parts: 'le' (lee) and 'o' (oh). A boy's name.

mia.tip: Two parts: 'mi' (mee) and 'a' (uh). A girl's name.

pack.tip: 'p' makes a popping /p/ sound. 'ck' is a digraph that makes the /k/ sound.

bag.tip: 'b' makes the /b/ sound. 'ag' makes the /ag/ sound.

for.tip: 'f' makes the /f/ sound. 'or' is r-controlled and sounds like /or/.

beach.tip: 'b' makes the /b/ sound. 'ea' makes the long /ee/ sound. 'ch' says /ch/.

they.tip: 'th' makes the buzzy /th/ sound. 'ey' makes the long /ay/ sound.

tall.tip: 't' makes the /t/ sound. 'all' makes the /awl/ sound.

with.tip: 'w' makes the /w/ sound. 'th' makes the quiet /th/ sound.

flag.tip: 'fl' is a blend. 'ag' makes the /ag/ sound.

cold.tip: 'c' makes the hard /k/ sound. 'old' sounds like /oh-ld/.

wave.tip: 'w' makes the /w/ sound. The silent 'e' makes 'a' say its name /ay/.

splashes.tip: Three parts: 'spl' - 'ash' - 'es'. 'spl' is a blend, 'sh' says /sh/.

their.tip: 'their' is a sight word. It sounds like 'there' /thair/.

feet.tip: 'f' makes the /f/ sound. 'ee' makes the long /ee/ sound.

eat.tip: 'ea' is a vowel digraph that makes the long /ee/ sound.

sweet.tip: 'sw' is a blend. 'ee' makes the long /ee/ sound.

under.tip: Two parts: 'un' and 'der'. The 'er' is r-controlled.

umbrella.tip: Three parts: 'um' - 'brel' - 'la'. Keeps you dry in the rain!

shoes.tip: 'sh' is a digraph that says /sh/. 'oes' makes the long /oo/ sound.

splat.tip: 'spl' is a three-letter blend. 'at' makes the short /at/ sound.

stepped.tip: 'stepp' has a short vowel, and 'ed' sounds like /t/ here (stept).

shoe.tip: 'sh' digraph says /sh/. 'oe' makes the long /oo/ sound.

wash.tip: 'w' makes the /w/ sound. 'ash' sounds like /osh/ here.
